title: tanacetum turcomanicum
intro: Tanacetum turcomanicum, also known as Tatarian chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. It is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Tanacetum turcomanicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
